questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the effect of the Acquisition on competition.

Describe whether the Acquisition could affect the wholesale supply of whitegoods and electronic household appliances to retailers in Australia and, if so, how. To what extent do Midea and Residentia compete in relation to the wholesale supply of whitegoods and electronic household appliances in Australia? Are there any categories of whitegoods or electronic household appliances that Midea and/or Residentia supply which have no, or few, other alternative suppliers in Australia?
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Midea and/or Residentia.
